mnemonics: Think 'EDGE' for Edge Streaming: 'Evaluate Data at its Genesis, Expediently'
keyPoints: Processes data in real-time as it is generated, close to the source (the 'edge')
Reduces latency and bandwidth usage by avoiding sending all raw data to the cloud
Enables immediate, automated responses and decisions based on the streaming data
commonMistakes: Assuming streaming analytics must happen in the cloud, missing the latency benefits of the edge
Confusing it with simple data filtering; it involves complex analysis like pattern recognition and anomaly detection
